ls-research.name: ls-research
ls-research.description: Explore product direction and produce a PRD before feature scoping. Use when requirements are unclear, scope spans multiple features, or stakeholder alignment is needed.

ls-epic.name: ls-epic
ls-epic.description: Write complete, traceable Epics using Liminal Spec methodology. Covers User Profile, Flows, Acceptance Criteria, Test Conditions, Data Contracts, and Story Breakdown.

ls-tech-design.name: ls-tech-design
ls-tech-design.description: Transform a Feature Spec into implementable Tech Design with architecture, interfaces, and test mapping. Validates the spec as downstream consumer.

ls-publish-epic.name: ls-publish-epic
ls-publish-epic.description: Publish a detailed epic as individual story files with full AC/TC detail and Jira section markers, and optionally a PO-friendly business epic with grouped ACs.

lss-story.name: lss-story
lss-story.description: Write a single functional story with epic-quality rigor. Story-sized epic for focused changes that don't warrant the full pipeline.

lss-tech.name: lss-tech
lss-tech.description: Perform inline technical design and embed results into a functional story. Story-sized tech design + enrichment with codebase analysis, architecture, interfaces, and test mapping.

ls-team-impl.name: ls-team-impl
ls-team-impl.description: Orchestrate story-by-story implementation with agent teams. Manages teammates, routes verification, and makes judgment calls across the full implementation cycle.

ls-team-impl-c.name: ls-team-impl-c
ls-team-impl-c.description: Orchestrate story-by-story implementation with agent teams and an external CLI model (Codex or Copilot). Opus teammates manage external model subagents for implementation and verification.

ls-subagent-impl-cc.name: ls-subagent-impl-cc
ls-subagent-impl-cc.description: Orchestrate story-by-story implementation with Claude Code subagents using staged TDD. Opus builds red-phase scaffolds and implements, Sonnet verifies red integrity and provides pedantic review. No external CLI required.

ls-team-spec.name: ls-team-spec
ls-team-spec.description: Orchestrate the full Liminal Spec pipeline with agent teams. Manages drafters and verifiers from orientation through technically enriched stories.

ls-epic.description: Phase 2: Epic writing with acceptance criteria, test conditions, and story breakdown

ls-tech-design.description: Phase 3: Transform epics into implementable technical designs

ls-publish-epic.description: Phase 4: Publish detailed epic as individual story files with Jira markers, optionally with a PO-friendly business epic

lss-story.description: Simple pipeline: Write a single functional story with epic-quality rigor

lss-tech.description: Simple pipeline: Inline technical design and enrichment for a single story
